briefdescription.para: The user can directly manipulate the vector, they can't break anything anyway.

doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR::Vector<unsigned short, MR.VoxelId>resizeWithReserve.
doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize, value) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR::Vector<unsigned short, MR.VoxelId>resizeWithReserve.

sets elements [pos, pos+len) to the given value, adjusting the size of the vector to include new elements; the elements in between old size and pos are also set to val (for faster implementation) Generated from method MR::Vector<unsigned short, MR.VoxelId>autoResizeSet.
sets the element #i to the given value, adjusting the size of the vector to include new element Generated from method MR::Vector<unsigned short, MR.VoxelId>autoResizeSet.
this accessor automatically adjusts the size of the vector Generated from method MR::Vector<unsigned short, MR.VoxelId>autoResizeAt.
